sourceAmbiguity: Request rows might disclose more than the detail view is allowed to show under audience or identity hold posture.
decisionTaken: Bind every row and detail shell to PatientAudienceCoverageProjection and render AudienceCoverageBadge with maxVisibleDetail.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: Row and detail use the same audience cap, so patient-safe summary boundaries are enforced before rendering.
operationalRisk: Additional row fields could bypass the projection cap.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Add row fields only through allowedFields and extend validator coverage before exposing them.
